messages.text: Heads up, LID-130 is active. I pushed a rough first pass around object-detection-service, but it is still definitely prototype code.
Latest branch has b41f81e4. The main symptom is still noisy on the rig, and the clean path only shows up when I replay the shorter clip pack.
